reminderMessages: Jal Leejiye, thak gaye honge!! 💧

Tamne paani ni jarur hase. 🌊

Aatlu kaam kari lidhu... have ek sip to bane. 😉✨
Tu cactus nathi, Paani pee. 🌵💦
Bottle paani piva maate muki chhe ke decoration mate? 🤨
Tari skin quietly request mokle chhe: Paani please. ✨
Mood off? Paani thi start kariye. 💙
Hydrate reh, overthink pachi karje. 😌

ESC + Enter karta karta thaaki gai hois, paani pee le. 😉

Mummy hot toh atyare sudhi 3 vaar kahi didhu hott, Paani pee le. 😂
Paani pee le... nakhra pachi karje. 😜
Ek sip lai ne aav, hu wait karu chhu. 🤝
Tu plant hot toh atyare sudhi sukai gayo hot. Paani pee le 🌱😂
successMessages: 😌 Aaje mummy ne complain nai hoy.
drinkWaterMessages: 🚰 Reminder sathe fari aavish {minutes} minute{plural} ma!

snoozeMessages: 🌊 Paani kyai nathi jatu. Pachhi maliye!
